content.en:
"Hahaha, I still have to thank you, if you hadn't gotten so many ruin stones, I wouldn't have been able to extract the ruin liquid to make a fortune!"

The Lord of Darkness said with a smile.

Anyway, he can't make progress at the moment, so time is not valuable, so having time to extract the ruins liquid is completely extra!

Even if the ruin liquid is of no use to him, he can cultivate his own clansmen and descendants, or cultivate some high-level members of the Dark Sea, which can make the Dark Sea stronger.

In short, the more resources of the ruin liquid, the better, and he will not dislike it.

Ye Tian quickly retired.

After going back, Ye Tian began to use the ruins liquid to refine his heart.

In terms of resource grade, the effect of mixed ruin liquid is much better than that of ordinary sunfish tears.

It's just that the Mixed Ruins Liquid requires the existence of the Bone Transformation Realm to be extracted from the Mixed Ruins Stone, so it is very troublesome, and the quantity is extremely rare.

But now, Ye Tian has so much mixed ruin liquid, and he can't consume it for a long time.

Of course.

If you want to refine the heart of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level geniuses to the extreme, it will take a long time, and you can't do it in a short period of time.

Ye Tian didn't have to worry about it now, with the resources he had now, it would not be a problem to reach the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

"What I have to do every day now is to cultivate more ancient techniques, although every time I add an ancient technique now, the strength to improve is limited, but the foundation will be stronger, and the combat effectiveness will also be improved. It is necessary to create more top-notch primeval bone techniques to make the immeasurable bones produce bone changes. "

"When my heart is tempered to the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and the immeasurable bones of my whole body are bone-transformed, I can break through to the Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With his foundation, once he becomes a bone transformation realm, he will definitely crush the ordinary bone transformation realm far away.

......

Taikoo Court.

This is a special treasure located in the boundary of the territorial waters, and it is the place where the Bone Transformation Realm is discussed.

On this day, there was a bone transformation in the Taikoo Pavilion.

The Lord of the Ancient Mountain of the Ancient Mountain, the Lord of the Darkness of the Dark Sea, the Lord of the Snow and Frost of the Ice and Snow Palace, the Lord of the Dragon Emperor, the leader of the Ancient Dragon Clan, the Lord of the Ancient Peng Clan, the Lord of the Ancient Peng Clan, and the King of Ten Thousand Trees, the leader of the Ancient Tree Clan......

This bone-bone metamorphosis existent all converges here.

You know, they are all beings who have not appeared for endless years, and they are usually in retreat, or they have gone to some mysterious place.

But at this moment, they all appeared, and something big must have happened.

At this time, neither the Lord of the Ancient Mountain nor the Lord of Darkness spoke, and all the Bone Transformation Realms were waiting for the arrival of one.

Airplanes!!!!

A figure soon appeared on the highest throne.

The figure was that of an old man, dressed in a gray robe with messy hair.

If it were in an ordinary small world, he might even be considered begging, and he couldn't tell that this existence was actually a great Bone Transformation Realm powerhouse.

"Lord of the Void!"

One of the bone-changing realms stood up and said respectfully.

The reason why they were respectful to this Lord of the Void was naturally because the Lord of the Void was the most powerful, and even the strongest person in the seam of the territorial waters, and he did not have any power, and he belonged to the Lone Wanderer.

The Lord of the Void likes to travel through the ordinary worlds in the territorial waters, and even likes to dress up as ordinary creatures and play the world, which is also his fun.

The last time they saw the Lord of the Cave Void, the Cave Void was still wearing the emperor's clothes, and it was estimated that he was the emperor in some empire.

Now I look at it, I should have run away to be a beggar.

Naturally, they would not comment on the pleasures of this Cave Void Lord, and none of them dared to question it.

"It's all here!"

The Lord of the Void spoke.

"It's all here!"

The Ancient Mountain Lord and the Bone Transformation Realm nodded.

"What's the matter this time, you have to notify me to be there!" asked the Lord of the Void.

The Lord of the Ancient Mountain spoke: "Lord of the Void Cave, two boundary rifts have been opened recently, the first one to open is the ruins of the dragon sea, the ruins of the dragon sea have not long been closed, and the passage to the boundary rift of our territorial waters has been opened, and a large number of creatures from the ruins of the dragon sea have broken in. Of course, the ruins of the dragon sea are not strong, so they are not dangerous. But this time, the Hunhe River Boundary Rift was also opened, and it was closed not long after. If the Hunhe River Boundary Rift also opens a passage to our territorial sea Boundary Rift, and a group of Bone Transformation Realms break in, it will be a disaster!"

"Hunhe River Boundary Crack, it's indeed troublesome!"

The Lord of the Void spared his head.

There are indeed a lot of bone transformation realms in the Hunhe Boundary Seam, if all the bone transformation realms come here, it would be good if the territorial sea boundary rift surrendered directly.

Every time, it is only a few forces in the Hunhe Boundary Rift that are willing to invade the territorial sea Boundary Seam, but it will also cause heavy losses in the territorial sea Boundary Seam.

Last time, it wasn't that the Hunhe Boundary Rift was repulsed, but that the time had come, and those bone transformation realms in the Hunhe River Boundary Rift were driven away.

Otherwise, where will they be able to bear it!

"What's the use of you calling me here, although my strength is stronger than yours, but the Lord of the Chaos Ruins in the Hunhe River Rift, even if his strength is suppressed, I can only barely contain him!"

The Lord of Darkness said, "Lord of the Void, we have to negotiate at least a countermeasure, what should we do if the Hunhe River Boundary Crack invades soon?"

The Lord of the Void said: "Actually, this is not the most serious thing, the Hunhe Boundary Crack is invading, it's a big deal that you hide, when the time comes, they have to leave." I'm worried about another situation, in which case it's really troublesome!"

"What's the situation?"

The Lord of Darkness asked.

"Boundary Gap Fusion!" said the Lord of the Cave Void: "I existed before the primeval era, and there was a boundary rift fusion in that era, and the territorial sea boundary crack is so big, it is actually a place where many boundary seams are fused. It's just that the years are so long ago that I can't even remember them. If it is really the boundary rift fusion, if the Hunhe boundary rift is integrated into the territorial sea boundary rift, then it can exist here forever!"

"This ...... Probably not!"

The faces of the Ancient Mountain Lord and the Lord of Darkness changed one by one.

"It's just a possibility!" said the Lord of the Void, "Because the opening of two boundary rifts in succession means that the barriers between the boundary rift and the boundary rift of the territorial sea are very weak. If you don't interfere, the chances of integration are not high. However, I'm afraid that those old guys in the Hunhe River Boundary will interfere!"

"The Bone Transformation Realm of the Hunhe Boundary Rift will interfere, why, what good will it do them to integrate into the territorial sea Boundary Rift?" the Lord of Darkness was puzzled.

The Lord of the Cave Void smiled and said, "Of course there are benefits, but the biggest advantage is that the Boundary Rift Land will not collapse. Anyway, the cracks I saw at the beginning are now gone, probably shattered, and all living beings have perished. The Hunhe Boundary Rift is higher than our territorial sea Boundary Rift, but it is just talking about the energy level. However, in reality, all territorial waters and boundary seams must be attached to the territorial sea boundary seams. The territorial sea itself is in the boundary seam of the territorial waters, but the boundary seams are embedded outside the barriers. Any accident, the boundary crack will shatter and completely turn into nothingness. The Hunhe Boundary Rift is very strong, but they are also worried about this kind of thing!"
